name: seq
description: Print sequences of numbers. (Defaults to increments of 1)

name: -w
--fixed-width
options.description: Equalize the widths of all numbers by padding with zeros as necessary

name: -s
--separator
options.description: String separator between numbers. Default is newline

name: -f
--format
options.description: Use a printf(3) style format to print each number

name: -t
--terminator
options.description: Use string to terminate sequence of numbers
